role_adherence_notes.linguistic: The agent provided no output, but this is consistent with the image containing no visible text or scripts.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant types (xeric grasses) and biome classification.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Focused on road infrastructure (dirt roads) and fencing styles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, camera artifacts) to distinguish candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the location. The specialist agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence, particularly the meta agent which identified a specific camera artifact (Google Trekker) that served as the decisive factor in the tournament. The tournament logic correctly utilized this evidence to distinguish between the two most similar candidates (Mongolia and Kazakhstan).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the arid steppe and flat topography.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described the sparse, low-lying vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the unpaved road and wooden fencing.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the camera blur artifact and roof styles.
